attempts.name: attempt1_pronoun
attempts.reason: The pronoun-copy dashboard still made the first explicit concept token an antecedent and failed the full-state idle sanity gate.

attempts.name: attempt2_batched_verification
attempts.reason: The initial corrected-template gate used batches of 16. A clean dashboard target for symmetric-016 changed top-1 status in the canonical single-prompt causal forward.

attempts.name: attempt3_masked_single_verification
attempts.reason: Even with batch_size=1, the clean verifier supplied an all-ones attention mask while the frozen causal clean forward supplied no mask. The near-tied symmetric-016 dashboard-B target was rank 1 only on the masked kernel path.

dataset.top1_rule: expected token must equal argmax; tied-max rank is insufficient
dataset.verification_forward: single prompt; add_special_tokens=False; no attention mask; selected-layer capture hook; state and logits from the same forward; matches frozen causal clean forward

decision.one_line: SURVIVES: AUC stays high on the matched design; the old metric mismatch does not solely explain the frozen READ_IG separation.

F_v7_3.title:
Within ENGINE: READ_IG vs primary full-state |C|
Spearman rho=-0.263, 95% CI [-0.503, 0.044]

F_v7_4.title: Causal sanity: primary full state FAIL; J-Lens subspace is diagnostic

heldout_detection.population: all VERIFIED evaluation pairs; calibration groups excluded

interpretation.qualified_scope: strong-versus-weak explicit-concept use; not perfectly idle dashboards under full-state interchange
